nasb.text: So Peter was kept in the prison, but prayer for him was being made fervently by the church to God.

esv.text: So Peter was kept in prison, but earnest prayer for him was made to God by the church.

cnv.text: 彼得就這樣被拘留在監裡；但教會卻為他迫切地祈求　神。

ccb.text: 彼得被囚期间，教会都迫切地为他向上帝祷告。

csbs.text: 这样，彼得被拘留在监狱里，教会却为他热切地向神祷告。
